attributes.llm.sql_preview:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT 10

attributes.db.statement:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT c.customer_id, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.kyc_status IN ('Verified', 'Pending')
GROUP BY c.customer_id
ORDER BY to

SELECT c.customer_id, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.kyc_status IN ('Verified', 'Pending')
GROUP BY c.customer_id
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT 10

attributes.db.statement:
SELECT c.customer_id, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.kyc_status IN ('Verified', 'Pending')
GROUP BY c.customer_id
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT 10

attributes.query.text: Can you provide a breakdown of the total balance for each customer in the bottom 10?

attributes.http.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

attributes.llm.sql_preview:
SELECT c.name, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.kyc_status IN ('Verified', 'Pending') AND c.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10

SELECT c.name, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.kyc_status IN ('Verified', 'Pending') AND c.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT 10

attributes.db.statement:
SELECT c.name, SUM(a.balance) as total_balance
FROM customers c
JOIN accounts a ON c.customer_id = a.customer_id
WHERE c.kyc_status IN ('Verified', 'Pending') AND c.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT 10

attributes.query.text: Can you provide a breakdown of the total balance for each customer in the bottom 10? Use customer name instead of customer id
